fa-book-user.appearanceId: open book with a person silhouette on the cover or visible page; bound volume displaying a human figure
fa-book-user.functionalityId: opens a personal profile or contact record book; navigates to a user's information or account details
fa-book-user.intentId: access a person's profile or bio information; view a user's details from a directory or record

fa-bookmark.appearanceId: tall rectangle with a pointed V-notch cut into the bottom center; vertical tab shape tapering to a downward chevron tip
fa-bookmark.functionalityId: saves a page or item for quick return; bookmarks content to access later
fa-bookmark.intentId: keep track of an important item or page; build a personal collection of saved content

fa-bookmark-circle.appearanceId: bookmark pennant shape enclosed inside a circle; pointed-bottom ribbon tab centered within a round ring
fa-bookmark-circle.functionalityId: saves or favorites an item within a grouped circle; adds a bookmark with a circular status indicator
fa-bookmark-circle.intentId: save and categorize an item in a circular context; mark content as bookmarked within a set

fa-bookmark-slash.appearanceId: bookmark pennant shape crossed by a diagonal slash line; pointed-bottom ribbon tab with a strikethrough diagonal
fa-bookmark-slash.functionalityId: removes or deletes a saved bookmark; unbookmarks a previously saved page or item
fa-bookmark-slash.intentId: remove a saved item from the bookmarks list; clear a bookmark that is no longer needed

fa-books.appearanceId: several upright book spines standing side by side on a shelf; a row of multiple rectangular book silhouettes
fa-books.functionalityId: opens a library or collection of documents; navigates to a reading list or resource catalog
fa-books.intentId: browse a library of content or publications; access a full catalog of documents or reading material

fa-books-medical.appearanceId: row of upright book spines with a medical cross symbol on one; multiple books standing together with a health emblem
fa-books-medical.functionalityId: opens a medical reference library or clinical resource; navigates to health or treatment documentation
fa-books-medical.intentId: find medical literature or clinical guidelines; access a health information or medical reference catalog

fa-boombox.appearanceId: wide rectangular portable stereo body with two circular speaker cones and a central control panel; classic cassette boom box silhouette with dual speakers
fa-boombox.functionalityId: plays or controls audio via a portable stereo; opens a music player or sound system interface
fa-boombox.intentId: listen to music on a portable audio device; control playback from a retro-style stereo

fa-boot.appearanceId: side-view ankle boot silhouette with a flat sole and short shaft; sturdy footwear profile with a rounded toe cap
fa-boot.functionalityId: marks a footwear category or product listing; filters items by boot or outdoor shoe type
fa-boot.intentId: browse boots or outdoor footwear options; find shoes in a boot category

fa-boot-heeled.appearanceId: side-view tall boot silhouette with a raised heel and pointed toe; heeled footwear profile with a slim elevated back
fa-boot-heeled.functionalityId: marks a high-heeled boot category or fashion item; filters footwear by heeled boot style
fa-boot-heeled.intentId: browse heeled boots or fashion footwear; find a specific style of dress boot

fa-booth-curtain.appearanceId: rectangular booth frame with a curtain hanging across the opening; upright stall outline with a draped fabric panel
fa-booth-curtain.functionalityId: indicates a private booth, dressing room, or polling station; marks an enclosed space requiring a curtain
fa-booth-curtain.intentId: access or indicate a private enclosed space; navigate to a voting booth or changing room

fa-border-all.appearanceId: square with all four outer edges and interior grid lines drawn; a box divided into cells with every border line visible
fa-border-all.functionalityId: applies borders to all sides and interior dividers of a cell or table; enables full border formatting
fa-border-all.intentId: draw visible lines around and inside all table cells; apply a complete border to a grid selection

fa-border-bottom.appearanceId: square outline with only the bottom edge drawn as a solid line; box shape with a single line at the base and no other borders
fa-border-bottom.functionalityId: applies a border only to the bottom edge of a cell or element; adds a bottom underline to a selected area
fa-border-bottom.intentId: add a visual separator beneath a row or element; apply a bottom border to a table cell

fa-border-center-h.appearanceId: rectangle with a single horizontal line through the vertical center and no outer edges; box frame split only by a horizontal midline
fa-border-center-h.functionalityId: applies a horizontal center border dividing a selection into top and bottom halves; draws a midline across selected cells
fa-border-center-h.intentId: split a table area with a horizontal center divider; add a horizontal midline border to a selection

fa-border-center-v.appearanceId: rectangle with a single vertical line through the horizontal center and no outer edges; box frame split only by a vertical midline
fa-border-center-v.functionalityId: applies a vertical center border dividing a selection into left and right halves; draws a vertical midline across selected cells
fa-border-center-v.intentId: split a table area with a vertical center divider; add a vertical midline border to a selection

fa-border-inner.appearanceId: square divided by inner horizontal and vertical grid lines without outer border edges; interior cross dividers inside a borderless box
fa-border-inner.functionalityId: applies borders only to the inner dividers of selected cells; draws internal grid lines without outer borders
fa-border-inner.intentId: add interior dividing lines to a table selection; apply inner cell borders without outer edges

fa-border-left.appearanceId: square outline with only the left edge drawn as a solid line; box shape with a single vertical line on the left side
fa-border-left.functionalityId: applies a border only to the left edge of a cell or element; adds a left-side line to a selected area
fa-border-left.intentId: mark the left boundary of a table cell or text block; apply a left border to a selection

fa-border-none.appearanceId: square outline drawn entirely in dashed or dotted lines indicating no borders; box shape with no solid edge lines visible
fa-border-none.functionalityId: removes all borders from a selected cell or element; clears any existing border formatting
fa-border-none.intentId: eliminate visible cell borders from a table selection; reset all borders to none

fa-border-outer.appearanceId: square with all four outer edges drawn as solid lines and no interior grid lines; plain bordered box with no inner dividers
fa-border-outer.functionalityId: applies borders only to the outer edges of a selection; draws a box outline around the entire selected area
fa-border-outer.intentId: enclose a table selection with an outer border only; box in a range of cells without inner lines

fa-border-right.appearanceId: square outline with only the right edge drawn as a solid line; box shape with a single vertical line on the right side
fa-border-right.functionalityId: applies a border only to the right edge of a cell or element; adds a right-side line to a selected area
fa-border-right.intentId: mark the right boundary of a table cell or text block; apply a right border to a selection

fa-border-style.appearanceId: square with outer edges shown in varying line styles such as solid, dashed, and dotted; box outline with mixed line patterns on each side
fa-border-style.functionalityId: opens border style options to change line type; applies a chosen line style to cell or element borders
fa-border-style.intentId: customize the style of table or element borders; choose between solid, dashed, or dotted border lines

fa-border-style-alt.appearanceId: square with outer edges shown in an alternative combination of line styles; box outline with a different mixed-style border pattern
fa-border-style-alt.functionalityId: selects an alternative border line style for cells or elements; applies a secondary style pattern to borders
fa-border-style-alt.intentId: apply an alternate border styling to a selection; choose a different line-style preset for table borders

fa-border-top.appearanceId: square outline with only the top edge drawn as a solid line; box shape with a single line at the top and no other borders
fa-border-top.functionalityId: applies a border only to the top edge of a cell or element; adds a top line to a selected area
fa-border-top.intentId: add a visual separator above a row or element; apply a top border to a table cell

fa-bore-hole.appearanceId: circular opening at the top of a cylindrical shaft descending into darkness; round hole with depth lines extending downward
fa-bore-hole.functionalityId: marks a drill site or borehole location on a map or diagram; indicates a geological or mining excavation point
fa-bore-hole.intentId: identify a drilling or excavation site; mark a borehole location for geological or construction purposes

fa-bottle-baby.appearanceId: tall feeding bottle with a rounded bottom, cylindrical body, and a nipple top; infant formula bottle with measurement markings
fa-bottle-baby.functionalityId: marks an infant feeding or baby nutrition item; opens a baby care or feeding product section
fa-bottle-baby.intentId: find or manage infant feeding products; indicate a baby bottle or newborn nutrition item

fa-bottle-droplet.appearanceId: upright cylindrical bottle with a droplet shape at the top or beside it; narrow container silhouette paired with a teardrop liquid drop
fa-bottle-droplet.functionalityId: indicates liquid product content or a dropper bottle; opens a medication, serum, or fluid product detail
fa-bottle-droplet.intentId: select or view a liquid product or fluid container; access dropper bottle or skincare serum information

fa-bottle-water.appearanceId: tall slim plastic bottle with a narrow cap and slightly wider body; upright water bottle silhouette with a sealed top
fa-bottle-water.functionalityId: marks a water or beverage product; opens hydration tracking or water intake features
fa-bottle-water.intentId: track water consumption or select a beverage; find water products or hydration reminders

fa-bow-arrow.appearanceId: curved bow with a taut string and an arrow nocked and aimed horizontally; archery bow and arrow silhouette in a drawn position
fa-bow-arrow.functionalityId: selects an archery or ranged weapon action; marks content related to hunting or archery sport
fa-bow-arrow.intentId: access archery or hunting-related features; indicate a ranged attack or bow sport context

fa-bowl-chopsticks.appearanceId: rounded wide bowl with two thin parallel chopsticks resting across the rim; circular vessel seen from slight above-angle with two slim utensils
fa-bowl-chopsticks.functionalityId: opens an Asian cuisine category or restaurant section; marks a meal as chopstick-served food
fa-bowl-chopsticks.intentId: browse Asian food options or chopstick-based dining; find a restaurant or dish associated with chopstick cuisine

fa-bowl-chopsticks-noodles.appearanceId: wide rounded bowl with wavy noodle loops visible inside and two chopsticks resting on the rim; circular dish containing curved pasta strands with utensils
fa-bowl-chopsticks-noodles.functionalityId: opens a noodle dish or Asian food menu section; marks ramen, udon, or noodle-based meal options
fa-bowl-chopsticks-noodles.intentId: order or browse noodle dishes and Asian cuisine; find ramen or noodle-based dining options

fa-bowl-food.appearanceId: wide rounded bowl with contents mounded above the rim; circular vessel with a filled domed center
fa-bowl-food.functionalityId: opens a food bowl or meal category; marks a dish as a bowl-style serving
fa-bowl-food.intentId: browse bowl meal options or food delivery; select a bowl-style dish from a menu

fa-bowl-rice.appearanceId: wide rounded bowl with a domed mound of rice visible above the rim; circular dish filled with a rounded heap of grain
fa-bowl-rice.functionalityId: opens an Asian food or rice dish menu section; marks a meal item as rice-based
fa-bowl-rice.intentId: order or browse rice dishes and Asian cuisine; select a rice bowl meal from a food menu

fa-bowl-scoop.appearanceId: wide rounded bowl with a single round scoop mound sitting inside; circular dish containing one domed ball of content
fa-bowl-scoop.functionalityId: marks a dessert or ice cream scoop item; opens a single-serving bowl or scoop product detail
fa-bowl-scoop.intentId: order or browse single-scoop dessert options; select an ice cream or scoop-served food item

fa-bowl-scoops.appearanceId: wide rounded bowl with multiple round scoop mounds stacked inside; circular dish containing two or more domed balls of content
fa-bowl-scoops.functionalityId: marks a multi-scoop dessert or serving; opens a multi-portion bowl or ice cream listing
fa-bowl-scoops.intentId: order a multi-scoop dessert or larger bowl serving; browse multiple-scoop ice cream options

fa-bowl-soft-serve.appearanceId: wide rounded bowl with a swirled soft-serve ice cream peak rising above the rim; circular dish with a curled spiral soft-serve top
fa-bowl-soft-serve.functionalityId: marks a soft-serve dessert or frozen treat item; opens a soft-serve ice cream or frozen yogurt section
fa-bowl-soft-serve.intentId: order soft-serve ice cream or a frozen dessert; browse frozen treat or dessert bowl options

fa-bowl-spoon.appearanceId: wide rounded bowl with an oval-headed spoon resting inside or beside it; circular dish paired with a long-handled utensil
fa-bowl-spoon.functionalityId: marks a soup, cereal, or spoon-served food item; opens a meal category served with a spoon
fa-bowl-spoon.intentId: browse soup, porridge, or spoon-based meals; order a dish typically eaten with a spoon

fa-bowling-ball.appearanceId: large solid sphere with three small finger-hole circles on its surface; round bowling ball with drilled grip holes
fa-bowling-ball.functionalityId: opens a bowling activity or sport section; marks content related to bowling games
fa-bowling-ball.intentId: find a bowling venue or activity; access bowling game or sport-related content

fa-bowling-ball-pin.appearanceId: large sphere beside a single upright pin with a narrow neck and wider base; bowling ball next to a standing pin silhouette
fa-bowling-ball-pin.functionalityId: marks a bowling game or lane interaction; opens a bowling score or strike tracking feature
fa-bowling-ball-pin.intentId: track bowling scores or find a bowling alley; access a bowling game session

fa-bowling-pins.appearanceId: multiple upright bowling pin silhouettes arranged in a triangular formation; cluster of standing pins with narrow necks and round bases
fa-bowling-pins.functionalityId: marks a bowling alley or game lane; opens a pin-setting or score-tracking bowling section
fa-bowling-pins.intentId: find a bowling venue or manage a game session; view pin counts or bowling statistics

fa-box.appearanceId: three-dimensional closed cardboard box with flap lines on top; rectangular shipping carton with a lid seam
fa-box.functionalityId: opens a package or shipment tracking view; marks an item as boxed or ready for shipping
fa-box.intentId: track or manage a shipped package; prepare or label an item for delivery

fa-box-alt.appearanceId: three-dimensional open-top box with visible inner depth and sidewalls; cardboard carton silhouette with an open lid
fa-box-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternative packaging or storage container view; marks an item in an open box state
fa-box-alt.intentId: manage or inspect an open container or package; view the contents of an unlidded box

fa-box-ballot.appearanceId: three-dimensional box with a narrow slot opening on the top surface; closed carton with a horizontal slit cut into the lid
fa-box-ballot.functionalityId: submits or deposits a ballot or vote into a collection box; indicates a drop-box for voting or forms
fa-box-ballot.intentId: cast a vote by dropping a ballot into the box; submit a document through a secure drop slot

fa-box-check.appearanceId: three-dimensional closed box with a checkmark overlaid on the front face; shipping carton with a tick mark on its surface
fa-box-check.functionalityId: marks a package as verified, inspected, or complete; confirms a boxed item has passed a quality check
fa-box-check.intentId: confirm that a package or order is correct and complete; verify a shipped box has been checked

fa-box-circle-check.appearanceId: three-dimensional box with a filled circle containing a checkmark badge overlaid; shipping carton with a circle-check indicator
fa-box-circle-check.functionalityId: confirms a package or delivery as fully approved and complete; marks a boxed item with a verified badge
fa-box-circle-check.intentId: confirm final approval or completion of a packaged order; indicate that a box has been officially verified

fa-box-fragile.appearanceId: three-dimensional box with a wine glass or broken-item symbol on the front face; shipping carton with a fragile handling icon
fa-box-fragile.functionalityId: marks a package as fragile or requiring careful handling; flags a shipment for gentle delivery treatment
fa-box-fragile.intentId: indicate that a package contains breakable items; request careful handling during shipping

fa-box-full.appearanceId: three-dimensional open box with contents overflowing above the top edge; open carton with items bulging out of the lid
fa-box-full.functionalityId: indicates a storage container or cart is at full capacity; marks a box as completely filled
fa-box-full.intentId: indicate that a package or inventory is full; show that no more items can be added to the box

fa-box-heart.appearanceId: three-dimensional box with a heart symbol on the front face; shipping carton with a love heart emblem
fa-box-heart.functionalityId: marks a gift box or care package with a heart; opens a favorites or gift-related packaging option
fa-box-heart.intentId: send or identify a care package or gift box; indicate a heartfelt or love-themed package

fa-box-open.appearanceId: three-dimensional box with flaps folded outward revealing an open top; open-lidded carton with four spread corner flaps
fa-box-open.functionalityId: opens or unpacks a package or container; reveals the contents of a previously sealed box
fa-box-open.intentId: unbox or access the contents of a package; open a container to view or retrieve its items

fa-box-tissue.appearanceId: rectangular tissue box with a single sheet of tissue pulling out from the slot on top; cardboard tissue carton with a protruding paper sheet
fa-box-tissue.functionalityId: marks a hygiene or tissue product; indicates a wellness or cleaning supply item
fa-box-tissue.intentId: find tissue or hygiene products; access cleaning or personal care supply information
